title: Farm Animals Song for Toddlers | Kids Cartoon #shorts
description:
DING DING! Benny rings the FARM BELL loud!
Sing farm animal sounds with Benny, a cow, a horse, a duck, and a sheep.
Toddlers practice listening and joining a fun morning animal song.
Kid-safe cartoon music for ages 2-8 in American English.
#shorts #kidssongs #preschool #toddler
